original_snippet_context: Discussing the budget for promoting national products abroad and the potential role of a "caixa de conversão" in determining the value of funds allocated for this purpose.
relevant_quote: Calculado o valor do ouro ao cambio do 13 d., que a caixa de conversão pretende firmar, esses quatro mil contos valerão, em papel moeda, sete mil e duzentos contos de réis.
justification: The text mentions the "caixa de conversão" and its potential impact on the exchange rate (fixing it at 13d) in a purely informational context, relating it to the budget calculations for promoting national products. It doesn't express an opinion on whether this rate is good or bad.
